action.content:
A task requiring determining the final positions of a set of objects given their initial positions and a description of a sequence of swaps.

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are playing a game. At the start of the game, they are each holding a ball: Alice has a yellow ball, Bob has a blue ball, and Claire has a pink ball.
As the game progresses, pairs of players trade balls. First, Claire and Alice swap balls. Then, Alice and Bob swap balls. Finally, Claire and Bob swap balls. At the end of the game, Bob has the
Options:
(A) yellow ball
(B) blue ball
(C) pink ball
A: (A)

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are playing a game. At the start of the game, they are each holding a ball: Alice has a white ball, Bob has a purple ball, and Claire has a pink ball.
As the game progresses, pairs of players trade balls. First, Bob and Alice swap balls. Then, Bob and Claire swap balls. Finally, Bob and Alice swap balls. At the end of the game, Alice has the
Options:
(A) white ball
(B) purple ball
(C) pink ball
A: (C)

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are dancers at a square dance. At the start of a song, they each have a partner: Alice is dancing with Lola, Bob is dancing with Rodrigo, and Claire is dancing with Patrick.
Throughout the song, the dancers often trade partners. First, Alice and Bob switch partners. Then, Claire and Bob switch partners. Finally, Bob and Alice switch partners. At the end of the dance, Alice is dancing with
Options:
(A) Lola
(B) Rodrigo
(C) Patrick
A: (C)

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are holding a white elephant gift exchange. At the start of the event, they are each holding a present of a different color: Alice has a pink ball, Bob has a black ball, and Claire has a purple present.
As the event progresses, pairs of people swap gifts. First, Bob and Claire swap their gifts. Then, Alice and Claire swap their gifts. Finally, Claire and Bob swap their gifts. At the end of the event, Claire has the
Options:
(A) pink ball
(B) black ball
(C) purple present
A:

action.content:
To determine the final positions of the objects, we can analyze the sequence of swaps for each scenario.

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are playing a game. At the start of the game, they are each holding a ball: Alice has a white ball, Bob has a purple ball, and Claire has a pink ball.
As the game progresses, pairs of players trade balls. First, Bob and Alice swap balls. Then, Bob and Claire swap balls. Finally, Bob and Alice swap balls. At the end of the game, Alice has the
Options:
(A) white ball
(B) purple ball
(C) pink ball

After the first swap, Bob and Alice swap balls. So, Alice has the purple ball, and Bob has the white ball.
After the second swap, Bob and Claire swap balls. So, Bob has the pink ball, Alice has the purple ball, and Claire has the white ball.
After the third swap, Bob and Alice swap balls. So, Bob has the purple ball, Alice has the pink ball, and Claire has the white ball.

Therefore, the correct answer is (C) pink ball.

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are dancers at a square dance. At the start of a song, they each have a partner: Alice is dancing with Lola, Bob is dancing with Rodrigo, and Claire is dancing with Patrick.
Throughout the song, the dancers often trade partners. First, Alice and Bob switch partners. Then, Claire and Bob switch partners. Finally, Bob and Alice switch partners. At the end of the dance, Alice is dancing with
Options:
(A) Lola
(B) Rodrigo
(C) Patrick

After the first swap, Alice and Bob switch partners. So, Alice is dancing with Rodrigo, Bob is dancing with Lola, and Claire is dancing with Patrick.
After the second swap, Claire and Bob switch partners. So, Alice is dancing with Rodrigo, Bob is dancing with Patrick, and Claire is dancing with Lola.
After the third swap, Bob and Alice switch partners. So, Alice is dancing with Patrick, Bob is dancing with Rodrigo, and Claire is dancing with Lola.

Therefore, the correct answer is (C) Patrick.

Q: Alice, Bob, and Claire are holding a white elephant gift exchange. At the start of the event, they are each holding a present of a different color: Alice has a pink ball, Bob has a black ball, and Claire has a purple present.
As the event progresses, pairs of people swap gifts. First, Bob and Claire swap their gifts. Then, Alice and Claire swap their gifts. Finally, Claire and Bob swap their gifts. At the end of the event, Claire has the
Options:
(A) pink ball
(B) black ball
(C) purple present

After the first swap, Bob and Claire swap gifts. So, Bob has the purple present, and Claire has the black ball.
After the second swap, Alice and Claire swap gifts. So, Alice has the black ball, Bob has the purple present, and Claire has the pink ball.
After the third swap, Claire and Bob swap gifts. So, Claire has the purple present, Bob has the pink ball, and Alice has the black ball.

Therefore, the correct answer is (C) purple present.
